message:
chore: add ephemeral profiling and test artifacts to .gitignore

Add patterns for files that should not be tracked:
- perf.data, perf.data.* - Linux perf profiler output
- flamegraph*.svg - Flamegraph visualization output
- golden_checksums.txt - Ephemeral test checksums

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,3 +19,13 @@ a.out
 
 # Profiling data (llvm-profdata)
 *.profraw
+
+# perf profiling data
+perf.data
+perf.data.*
+
+# Flamegraph output
+flamegraph*.svg
+
+# Test checksums (ephemeral)
+golden_checksums.txt
